'''455 [[Tinegris Street]]''' was [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Barkale]]'s home away from home on [[Kintoni/Legends|Kintoni]]. He stored his vast personal fortune, consisting of cash and rare artwork worth billions of Imperial [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], much of which had been embezzled from the sector treasury.<ref name="Tales" />

Barkale was able to keep his safehouse secret from the occupying [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces commanded by [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]. When he was freed by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], he brought her to this building, where she revealed that she had been investigating him for misappropriating sector funds and executed him with her blaster. She subsequently revealed the location to Madine, who claimed Barkale's ill-gotten fortune for the Alliance.<ref name="Tales" />

==Appearances==
